engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating a physical product — the page argues via '5 outstanding advantages', standardized-extract mechanism, GMP/government certs, and product lineup with prices. No defined-expertise person to trust, no portfolio, no place to browse; it's a THING being proven.

goal.one_action: place an order for the supplement (via on-page order form or by calling the hotline)

structure.archetype_note: Product/DTC supplement site: home sells the argument, /san-pham order form is the conversion, /diem-ban is a stockist directory; hotline tel is a parallel order path.

mapped.observed_as: Hỗ trợ giảm đường huyết, hỗ trợ giảm HbA1c
Hỗ trợ giảm nguy cơ biến chứng của tiểu đường
5 ƯU ĐIỂM VƯỢT TRỘI CỦA TPBVSK DIABETNA
BỘ SẢN PHẨM CỦA DIABETNA (product lineup with prices)
Đặt hàng trực tuyến - Giao hàng tận nhà (order form)

unmapped.observed: XEM ĐIỂM BÁN GẦN NHẤT — regional directory of pharmacy stockists (North/Central/South)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Not a single place's map+hours; it's a browsable multi-region list of retail points where the product is sold

proposed_new.name: stockist-locator
proposed_new.evidence: /diem-ban page is a regional directory table of pharmacy retail points across North/Central/South Vietnam where the product can be bought — a 'where to buy' stockist list, distinct from map-hours (one venue's map+hours) and catalog (own products).

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; clear DTC product structure, forms, ctas, proof, and commerce all captured.

gap_findings: A 'where-to-buy' stockist/retail-point directory (multi-region pharmacy list) has no capability slug — map-hours only covers a single venue.
Order form doubles as a lightweight price-calculator order path with hotline (tel) as a parallel conversion; form mechanism captures it but the tel-order duality is worth noting.
